title: Saudi Arabian Oxtail Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew from Saudi Arabia, made with tender oxtail meat and a blend of aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the oxtail pieces in batches, then set aside.
Add more oil if needed and sauté the chopped onion until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the browned oxtail, stew mix, cumin, and beef broth. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 2 1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with crusty bread.
